questionsAsked: What type of SACCO is this for? → Chama (informal savings group)
Is this multi-tenant or single-chama? → Single chama instance
What OAuth2 provider? → Spring Authorization Server
Frontend or API-only? → Full stack (API + Web + Mobile-ready)
constraints: REST APIs serving web + future mobile
Immutable audit trail on all mutations

candidates.name: Option A: Modular Monolith
candidates.summary: Single Spring Boot app with Maven modules per domain. Shared PostgreSQL. Simple deployment. Clean module boundaries via Maven dependency rules.
risks: Module coupling over time — mitigate with strict Maven dependency rules
Ledger accuracy — mitigate with double-entry balance assertions
mvp: Phase 2: sacco-contribution + sacco-ledger + sacco-audit (money in + accounting)

candidates.name: Option B: Microservices
candidates.summary: Each domain as independent Spring Boot service with API Gateway, service discovery, and message broker. Maximum separation but massive operational overhead.
mvp: Same feature phases but each is a standalone service

candidates.name: Option C: Modular Monolith with Event-Driven Internals
candidates.summary: Like Option A but modules communicate via Spring Application Events. Clear extraction path to microservices later. Ledger and audit auto-react to domain events.
risks: Slightly more abstract than direct calls
mvp: Same as Option A with events added incrementally

recommendation.backup: Option C: Modular Monolith with Event-Driven Internals
